\tzpentry{ID11393}{Nested Radius Contraction}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
A nested enclosure is represented by a radius contraction factor lambda between zero and one.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
R_{n+1}=\lambda R_{n},\qquad 0<\lambda<1
